pulse: Netanyahu quietly binds himself to Trump while Conor does the real work and Putin silently calculates everyone's weakness.
scene: Trump declared himself chef, Netanyahu cheered, and Conor took the stove anyway. By dusk, the galley was a study in hierarchy: Trump gesturing authority, Netanyahu backing him smoothly, Conor at the stove doing the work, and Putin watching from the threshold with the patience of someone counting mistakes.
